readings.summary: The Spirit comes to the Apostles as tongues of fire.

readings.citation:
Ps 104:1, 24, 29-30, 31, 34, R. see v.30
Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 104:1, 24, 29-30, 31, 34, R. see v.30
Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.

readings.citation: Rom 8:8-17 (Year A also may be used)
readings.summary: The Spirit of God lives in you.

Come, Holy Spirit, fill the hearts of your faithful
and kindle in them the fire of your love.

The Father will send you an Advocate.

Year A reading option as well —Jn 20:19-23

antiphons.text:
The Spirit of the Lord has filled the whole world
and that which contains all things
understands what is said, alleluia.

antiphons.citation: Entrance Antiphon • Option II | Rom 5:5; cf. 8:11
antiphons.text:
The love of God has been poured into our hearts
through the Spirit of God dwelling within us, alleluia.

They were all filled with the Holy Spirit
and spoke of the marvels of God, alleluia.
